text:
my earnings from the last 18 months:  

dec 23: $3,200 (salary)
jan 24: $3,200 (salary)
feb 24: $3,200 (salary)
mar 24: $3,200 (salary)
apr 24: $0 (quit 9-5 job, full-time as indie hacker)
may 24: $0
jun 24: $0
jul 24: $0
aug 24: $2,300 (salary) (fail and back to job)
sep 24:

4hours coding.
4 hours marketing.
1 hour working out.

Did this every day for 11 months, and boom, 260k users, 130k$ total revenue, and $19,7k monthly revenue!

Stay consistent.
Small habits = big wins over time

My Tech Stack for Building a $18K/Month, 150K-User Product

 Frontend:
- Next.js
- TailwindCSS
- Shadcn UI
- React Query
- Zustand

 Mobile:
- React Native (Expo)

 Backend:
- NestJS

 Database:
       - Supabase

 IDE:
- Cursor AI

 Payment:
       - RevenueCat

Stop overthinking. Just build.
A website. An API. A scrappy MVP.
A Chrome extension. An AI agent. A simple automation script.

That’s how you flip the script.

I just received the bill for my app’s operational costs, running at:

 $17.5K/month
 145K users
 8K–12K daily active users

Breakdown:
- Supabase: $93
- Railway server: $47
- OpenAI API: $146
- Speech-to-text API: $80 (170.584 mins)
- RevenueCat: $175
- Claude API & Llama:

My app just hit $17.5K in revenue for the first time last month!  I've decided to resign from my current job to go all-in and focus 100% on my product, officially putting an end (at least temporarily) to my 9-to-5 journey, though I might go back if things don’t work out lol .

That's right! I dedicated:

4 hours to coding
4 hours to marketing
1 hour to exercising

Did this every day for 4 months, and boom, 100K users, $25K total revenue, and $14K monthly revenue!

My Tech Stack for Building a $19.5K/Month, 230k User Product. Built by Me Only 

 Frontend:
- Next.js
- TailwindCSS
- Shadcn UI
- React Query
- Zustand

 Mobile:
- React Native (Expo)
- NativeWind
- React Native Reusables

 Backend:
- NestJS

 Database:
 - Supabase

4 hours to coding
4 hours to marketing
1 hour to exercising

Did this every day for 9 months, and boom, 214k users, 90k$ total revenue, and $19,5k monthly revenue!

Keep up good habits, and little wins will start showing up
So lucky I hosted my product on Railway. Hopefully, I won’t have to move it elsewhere
